description: You are a network security analyst reviewing web traffic from a workstation flagged by your IDS. Reconstruct the HTTP browsing session from the packet capture at /home/ga/Documents/captures/http.cap and produce an analysis report at /home/ga/Documents/captures/http_analysis_report.txt. The report must include all HTTP request URIs (full paths for GET/POST), the web server IP address, all observed HTTP response status codes, the client User-Agent string, and the total count of HTTP request packets. Label each section clearly and list all URIs and status codes individually. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
